tool_args.label: MTA Bridges and Tunnels
tool_args.raw_text: MTA Bridges and Tunnels is comprised of over 1,000 employees and operates seven bridges and two tunnels in New York City, handling over 330 million vehicle crossings every year in addition to managing the Congestion Relief Zone.

payload.description: MTA agency comprised of over 1,000 employees operating seven bridges and two tunnels in New York City, handling over 330 million vehicle crossings every year, managing the Congestion Relief Zone.

evidence_refs.source_quote: MTA Bridges and Tunnels is comprised of over 1,000 employees and operates seven bridges and two tunnels in New York City, handling over 330 million vehicle crossings every year in addition to managing the Congestion Relief Zone.

tool_args.label: MTA Construction & Development

tool_args.raw_text: MTA Construction & Development awarded a $249 million design-build contract to Skanska Koch Inc.

tool_args.label: Metropolitan Transportation Authority (MTA)
tool_args.raw_text: The Metropolitan Transportation Authority is North America's largest transportation network, serving a population of 15.3 million people across a 5,000 square-mile travel area.

payload.description: North America's largest transportation network, serving a population of 15.3 million people across a 5,000 square-mile travel area.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The Metropolitan Transportation Authority is North America's largest transportation network, serving a population of 15.3 million people across a 5,000 square-mile travel area surrounding New York City through Long Island, southeastern New York State, and Connecticut.

tool_args.label: Verrazzano-Narrows Bridge Cable Dehumidification
tool_args.raw_text: Last month MTA Construction & Development awarded a $249 million design-build contract to Skanska Koch Inc. for dehumidification of the main cables of the Verrazzano-Narrows Bridge. This contract marks the second of MTA Bridges and Tunnels four suspension bridges to receive this lifespan-extending technology.

payload.description: Four-year design-build contract for cable dehumidification of the Verrazzano-Narrows Bridge main cables, including replacement of bridge lights, hand ropes, hardware attaching cables to suspension ropes, and acoustic monitoring system installation.

evidence_refs.source_quote: MTA Construction & Development awarded a $249 million design-build contract to Skanska Koch Inc. for dehumidification of the main cables of the Verrazzano-Narrows Bridge.

the four-year contract will include replacement of bridge lights, hand ropes and the hardware attaching the main cables to the roadway suspension ropes. An acoustic monitoring system for tracking of conditions within the main cables will also be installed.
Cable Dehumidification Underway
